queries: وَالَّذِينَ يَرْمُونَ الْمُحْصَنَاتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَأْتُوا بِأَرْبَعَةِ شُهَدَاءَ فَاجْلِدُوهُمْ ثَمَانِينَ جَلْدَةً وَلَا تَقْبَلُوا لَهُمْ شَهَادَةً أَبَدًا وَأُولَئِكَ هُمُ الْفَاسِقُونَ

إِنَّ الَّذِينَ جَاؤُوا بِالْإِفْكِ عُصْبَةٌ مِنْكُمْ لَا تَحْسَبُوهُ شَرًّا لَكُمْ بَلْ هُوَ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مِنْهُمْ مَا اكْتَسَبَ مِنَ الْإِثْمِ وَالَّذِي تَوَلَّى كِبْرَهُ مِنْهُمْ لَهُ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
فأقبلت حمنة بنت جحش، وهي امرأة من الأنصار، فذكرت ذلك لبعض أزواج النبي
وَالَّذِينَ يَرْمُونَ الْمُحْصَنَاتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَأْتُوا بِأَرْبَعَةِ شُهَدَاءَ
إِنَّ الَّذِينَ جَاءُوا بِالْإِفْكِ عُصْبَةٌ مِنْكُمْ
إِنَّ الَّذِينَ جَاؤُوا بِالْإِفْكِ سورة النور
قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم

output.code: import json, re, unicodedata, textwrap, itertools, sys

# Load dataset to fetch verse 24:4
import json, re, unicodedata, os, itertools, textwrap, sys, pathlib

# Let's load quranic_verses.json from /mnt/data maybe not present
path='/mnt/data/quranic_verses.json'
print(os.path.exists(path))

# find quote spans in quotes
spans=[]
for m in re.finditer(r'\"([^\"]+)\"', text):
    spans.append((m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)))
len(spans), spans[:5]

# Let's compute index values again precisely for each span.

import re
spans_info=[]
# verse 4
verse4_text = "وَالَّذِينَ يَرْمُونَ الْمُحْصَنَاتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَأْتُوا بِأَرْبَعَةِ شُهَدَاءَ فَاجْلِدُوهُمْ ثَمَانِينَ جَلْدَةً وَلَا تَقْبَلُوا لَهُمْ شَهَادَةً أَبَدًا وَأُولَئِكَ هُمُ الْفَاسِقُونَ"
for m in re.finditer(re.escape(verse4_text), text):
    spans_info.append(('aya4', m.start(), m.end()))
    print('aya4', m.start(), m.end())

# verse 11 string
verse11_text_full = "إِنَّ الَّذِينَ جَاؤُوا بِالْإِفْكِ عُصْبَةٌ مِنْكُمْ لَا تَحْسَبُوهُ شَرًّا لَكُمْ بَلْ هُوَ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مِنْهُمْ مَا اكْتَسَبَ مِنَ الْإِثْمِ وَالَّذِي تَوَلَّى كِبْرَهُ مِنْهُمْ لَهُ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ"
for m in re.finditer(re.escape(verse11_text_full), text):
    spans_info.append(('aya11', m.start(), m.end()))
    print('aya11', m.start(), m.end())

# partial verse phrase
partial="إِنَّ الَّذِينَ جَاؤُوا بِالْإِفْكِ عُصْبَةٌ مِنْكُمْ لَا تَحْسَبُوهُ شَرًّا لَكُم"
for m in re.finditer(re.escape(partial), text):
    spans_info.append(('aya11partial', m.start(), m.end()))
    print('partial', m.start(), m.end())

# hadith narrative first: we can capture from first quote until preceding verse quote.

# But we earlier captured quote start 483 to 845, but let's confirm:
print(spans[:3])

# find quote spans that include narrative by detecting 'فأقبلت حمنة بنت جحش' until 'فأنزل الله تعالى: '
pattern = r'فأقبلت حمنة بنت جحش[^"]+?فأنزل الله تعالى: '
for m in re.finditer(pattern, text):
    print(m.start(), m.end())

canonical_aya4 = "وَالَّذِينَ يَرْمُونَ الْمُحْصَنَاتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَأْتُوا بِأَرْبَعَةِ شُهَدَاءَ فَاجْلِدُوهُمْ ثَمَانِينَ جَلْدَةً وَلَا تَقْبَلُوا لَهُمْ شَهَادَةً أَبَدًا ۚ وَأُولَـٰئِكَ هُمُ الْفَاسِقُونَ"
canonical_aya11 = "إِنَّ الَّذِينَ جَاءُوا بِالْإِفْكِ عُصْبَةٌ مِنْكُمْ ۚ لَا تَحْسَبُوهُ شَرًّا لَكُمْ ۖ بَلْ هُوَ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ ۚ لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مِنْهُمْ مَا اكْتَسَبَ مِنَ الْإِثْمِ ۚ وَالَّذِي تَوَلَّىٰ كِبْرَهُ مِنْهُمْ لَهُ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ"
def normalize(s):
    return ''.join(c for c in s if c not in '\u200c\u200d\u200e\u200f') # remove zero width maybe
print(citations[0]['span_text'] == canonical_aya4)
print(citations[1]['span_text'] == canonical_aya11)
print(citations[2]['span_text'] == canonical_aya11)

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
